name: General Cancer / Malignant Neoplasm Diagnosis Codes
description: ICD-10-CM codes for malignant neoplasms (C00-C96 representative codes). Used as exclusion criteria in multiple HEDIS measures where active cancer diagnosis may exempt a member from screening or treatment measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Malignant neoplasm of unspecified part of unspecified bronchus or lung
Malignant neoplasm of unspecified site of unspecified female breast
Malignant neoplasm of unspecified site of unspecified male breast
Malignant neoplasm of cervix uteri, unspecified
Malignant neoplasm of unspecified kidney, except renal pelvis
Multiple myeloma not having achieved remission
Acute lymphoblastic leukemia not having achieved remission
Acute myeloblastic leukemia not having achieved remission
